title: Misunderstandings, Mischaracterizations, and the Problematic Choice of a Specific Instance in Which the IE Should Never Be Applied
abstract: It is our pleasure to respond to the Editor's request for a commentary on Luo's article (this issue), which critically evaluates the utility of the intrinsic estimator (IE) that we first introduced to demography and sociology in
authors_text: Yang, Yang Claire; Land, Kenneth C.
